messages.content:
(swe) ids@ids-System-Product-Name:~/workspace/experiment-agent$ git init
Reinitialized existing Git repository in /home/ids/workspace/experiment-agent/.git/
(swe) ids@ids-System-Product-Name:~/workspace/experiment-agent$ git commit -m "first commit"
On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.
nothing to commit, working tree clean
(swe) ids@ids-System-Product-Name:~/workspace/experiment-agent$ git add .
(swe) ids@ids-System-Product-Name:~/workspace/experiment-agent$ git commit -m "first commit"
On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.
nothing to commit, working tree clean
(swe) ids@ids-System-Product-Name:~/workspace/experiment-agent$ git branch -M main
(swe) ids@ids-System-Product-Name:~/workspace/experiment-agent$ git commit -m "first commit"
On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.
nothing to commit, working tree clean
(swe) ids@ids-System-Product-Name:~/workspace/experiment-agent$ git remote add origin git@github.com:kle1n2/EA-MCTS.git
error: remote origin already exists.为什么报错

这个错误是因为你的本地仓库已经配置了一个名为 `origin` 的远程仓库。从错误信息可以看出：

**原因分析：**
1. 你使用 `git init` 时显示 "Reinitialized existing Git repository"，说明这已经是一个 Git 仓库
2. 显示 "Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'"，说明已经存在 `origin` 远程仓库
3. 当你尝试添加新的 `origin` 时，就会报错

**解决方案：**

**方案1：查看现有的远程仓库**
```bash
git remote -v
```
这会显示当前配置的远程仓库地址。

**方案2：删除旧的 origin，添加新的**
```bash
git remote remove origin
git remote add origin git@github.com:kle1n2/EA-MCTS.git
```

**方案3：修改现有的 origin 地址**
```bash
git remote set-url origin git@github.com:kle1n2/EA-MCTS.git
```

**方案4：使用不同的远程仓库名称**
```bash
git remote add new-origin git@github.com:kle1n2/EA-MCTS.git
```

**推荐使用方案3**，因为它直接更新现有的远程仓库地址，最简单直接。

执行后可以用以下命令验证：
```bash
git remote -v
```

然后就可以推送代码了：
```bash
git push -u origin main
```
